mapper.sql: id, notice_title, notice_type, notice_content, status, publish_time, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_notice SET notice_title = #{noticeTitle}, notice_type = #{noticeType}, notice_content = #{noticeContent}, status = #{status}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE AND version = #{version}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_notice WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_notice SET deleted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
